description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On the right side, there is a single pull-out drawer above a cabinet door, both equipped with round metallic knobs for easy access. The left side of the desk is solid, providing structural support and a clean, uninterrupted panel. The desk's surfaces display a subtle wood grain texture, giving it a classic and slightly vintage appearance. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the desk resting on four short legs that slightly elevate it from the ground. The finish shows minor signs of wear, suggesting it has been lightly used but remains in good condition.
description: A dark brown wooden desk with a flat top, right-side drawer and cabinet, and a classic, sturdy design. Subtle wood grain and metallic knobs add to its vintage appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat tabletop, right-side drawer, and cabinet with visible knobs.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the solid panel and the desk's depth, with no visible drawers or cabinet.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, uninterrupted wooden panel across the entire width.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a solid panel similar to the right, with no interactive features visible.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and cabinet door is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
